THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RYAN, DONALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT $518.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $568.00, CLAIM AGAINST MARIANNE WONG IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
